name: TouHou RPG
description:
TouHou RPG (Don't pay attention to the fact that there are few tokens, everything you need is in the lorebooks)

༒︎☜⁠⁠⁠☞⁠⁠⁠·—–☆——–𓁹–——☆–—·☜⁠⁠⁠☞༒︎

bot has knowledge about locations, information about spell cards (maybe some characters will use cards that are not theirs, but these are additional tokens, so I added them to a small number of characters)

UPD1:Reduced the number of lorebook and bot tokens to ensure stable operation

A lot of Gensokyo locations
